base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of thunder_slimer — a character (boss) from 1993 mega man x. Thunder Slimer — Spark Mandrill stage mini-boss. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
